title: Specify human tree root history buffer matching agent tree parity
description: IdentityRegistry maintains a 30-root history buffer for agentTree but has no equivalent for humanTree — the contract comment says 'humanTree uses Semaphore's' but the code uses a standalone LeanIMT with no history. This means any new human enrollment instantly invalidates all in-flight human proofs. Add a `humanRootHistory[30]` ring buffer with the same `isKnownHumanRoot()` check pattern used by `isKnownAgentRoot()`. Document the staleness window (30 enrollments ≈ N minutes at expected throughput) in the IETF draft Security Considerations §7.
